standard: Doughty T57000 / T57200 half coupler & hook clamp (Ø48-51 barrel)
description: Stage-rigging half coupler / hook clamp closed around the standard 48-51 mm barrel: ring body, closing-bolt lug over the crown, and a hanging tang with a Ø12.7 fixing eye — or, on the hook-clamp variant, a protruding M12 hanging stud. One solid.
source: Doughty T57000/T57010/T58080/T58100/T57200 datasheets (bore, width, eye, base drop, stud); cross-checked vs Riggatec/Global Truss/Kupo; wall/tang/lug proportions
